title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Google DeepMind tools including AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity enable researchers at Makerere University in Uganda to identify genetic targets for breast cancer vaccine development. The team analyzed 15,000 potential protein binding sites and narrowed them to 15 viable targets for laboratory validation, demonstrating practical application of AI in oncology research accessible via laptop and server infrastructure.
